description: A work order has been fully completed and all units have passed final inspection. It needs to be closed.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the produced quantity matches the ordered quantity on the work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that 100 out of 100 units are marked as complete.

nodes.task_description: Check for any outstanding labor or material transactions that need to be recorded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that all labor and materials have been fully accounted for.

nodes.task_description: Change the work order status to 'Closed'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully closes the work order, and the system calculates final costs.
